text: Epstein stole staff from Mar-a-Lago circa 2004, causing his falling-out with Trump; victim later abused by Epstein.

location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York NY
text: Epstein told cellmate Tartaglione prosecutors offered him freedom if he would implicate Trump in his crimes.

location: U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee, Washington, D.C.
text: FBI Director Patel testified before Senate Judiciary Committee; Sen. Schiff pressed him over FBI handling of Epstein case files

location: Bryan Federal Prison Camp, Bryan TX
text: Maxwell transferred from Florida federal prison to minimum-security camp in Texas, prompting victim outrage

location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York NY
text: OIG: CO Noel carried linen to L Tier at 10:40 PM — last guard contact before Epstein's death
